title: filix-mas cristata
intro: Filix-mas cristata, also known as the crested male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Filix-mas cristata are said to include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
